description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Old, according to Goitein. Perhaps 11th century. Detailed list of rent for shuqqas (robes) and ʿamāmas (turbans) as well as some other graments and items. The name Bū Yūsuf b. Bahlūl appears. See Goitein's note card for further information.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
